changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.comment: Canonical metric / on-demand LOD architecture: per-point 30-second window columns are no longer stored — they are now recomputed on demand by the chart-series endpoint from the canonical RAW_OUTLIER_CLEANED stream. Track-level peak (*_30s_max) columns stay on gps_track and are populated at ingest by PointWindowedRateCalculator.

changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.comment: SIMPLIFIED_FIXED_POINTS variants are no longer pre-computed at ingest. Charts now query the canonical RAW_OUTLIER_CLEANED stream via /api/tracks/{id}/chart-series with on-demand bucket aggregation. Drop the discriminator column and any persisted rows of that type.
